    Onion - Class in RestaurantGame
     
    Onion() - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.Onion
    Constructor that creates a default Onion topping with the preset price and name.

    Constructor that creates an Onion topping with a specified price and name.

    oven - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    VBox to represent the oven
    oven - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Oven of Toppings that holds Toppings on prep screen
    Oven<T> - Class in RestaurantGame
    A generic Oven class that stores a limited number of ingredients of type T.
    Oven(int) - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.Oven
    Creates a new Oven with a specified capacity.
